summary: Iteration 152: Dual Currency Economy & Shop System - ALL TESTS PASSED (18/18 backend, all frontend UI verified). Fixed 1 bug: KeyError in /api/rpg/shop/convert endpoint when accessing currencies dict. Backend: Shop endpoint returns currencies (gems/dust/soul_fragments), 3 gem packs ($0.99/$4.99/$9.99), 8 dust shop items, 9 gem shop items, 4 slot unlocks, and 1:10 conversion rate. All purchase, conversion, and unlock flows working. Frontend: Shop tab visible with 4 sub-views (Dust Shop/Gem Shop/Buy Gems/Slots) all toggling correctly.
seed_data_creation: Created fresh test users with uuid prefix for clean state testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Dual Currency Shop System fully implemented and tested. Backend routes at /app/backend/routes/rpg.py lines 1141-1520. Frontend at /app/frontend/src/pages/RPGPage.js. Key data-testids: tab-shop, shop-view-dust, shop-view-gems, shop-view-packs, shop-view-slots, shop-item-{id}, buy-{id}, buy-pack-{id}, gem-conversion, convert-amount-input, convert-gems-btn, slot-unlock-{id}, unlock-{id}. Currency mapping: stardust_shards = Celestial Gems, cosmic_dust = Cosmic Dust. Conversion rate: 1 gem = 10 dust. Slot costs: hands=50, feet=75, relic=125, aura=200 gems.

bug_fixed.issue: KeyError when accessing currencies['cosmic_dust'] and currencies['stardust_shards'] directly
bug_fixed.fix: Changed to use .get() method with default value 0

GET /api/rpg/shop.details: Returns currencies (gems, dust, soul_fragments), gem_packs (3), dust_shop (8 items), gem_shop (9 items), slot_unlocks (4), conversion_rate (10)

POST /api/rpg/shop/buy (dust).details: Deducts cosmic dust, adds item to inventory

POST /api/rpg/shop/buy (gems).details: Deducts celestial gems, adds item to inventory

POST /api/rpg/shop/convert.details: Converts gems to dust at 1:10 rate

POST /api/rpg/equip (locked slot).details: Verified extra slots are locked by default

POST /api/rpg/shop/purchase-gems.details: Creates Stripe checkout session with correct metadata

Frontend Shop tab.details: Visible in RPG navigation with currency display

Frontend 4 sub-views.details: Dust Shop, Gem Shop, Buy Gems, Slots all toggle correctly

Frontend Dust Shop.details: Shows 8 items with buy buttons and owned status

Frontend Gem Shop.details: Shows 9 premium items with rarity badges (rare/epic/legendary)

Frontend Slots view.details: Shows 4 locked slots with gem costs and unlock buttons

Frontend Buy Gems view.details: Shows 3 gem packs ($0.99/$4.99/$9.99) and currency conversion UI
